requirements.task_name: Save two modern single-family homes under $550,000 and 1800–2500 sq ft to favorites
requirements.task_description: Find completed modern single-family home projects with sizes between 1800–2500 sq ft and estimated build cost under $550,000, then add the first two matching projects to your favorites list.
existing_variables: saved_items
// contains saved project IDs with item_type = 'project'
projects
// project_type, style, size_sq_ft, estimated_cost/budget_* can be inspected for constraints

requirements.task_name: Request a quote for a similar 2022 kitchen renovation costing between $40,000 and $80,000
requirements.task_description: Locate a kitchen renovation project completed in 2022 with a budget between $40,000 and $80,000, then use the “Request a similar project” form on that project’s page to submit a quote request.
existing_variables: project_inquiries
// records from requestSimilarProjectQuote with project and form fields
projects
// used to validate project year, kitchen-related room_type, and budget range

requirements.task_name: Choose the cheaper of two 3-bedroom house plans under 2000 sq ft and start a consultation
requirements.task_description: From the pre-designed house plans section, find two plans with exactly 3 bedrooms and under 2000 sq ft, compare their estimated build costs, then start a consultation request specifically for the cheaper plan.
existing_variables: plans
// contains bedrooms, size_sq_ft, estimated_build_cost for each plan
plan_filters
// records current plan filter criteria; useful but not sufficient to prove comparison
plan_consultations
// records plan_id, name, email, message for consultation, but not alternative plans considered

required_variables.set_condition: After successfully loading a plan (plan != null) where plan.bedrooms === 3 and typeof plan.size_sq_ft === 'number' and plan.size_sq_ft < 2000. If the plan.id is not yet in the stored array and the array currently has fewer than 2 entries.
required_variables.reason: Tracks which qualifying 3-bedroom-under-2000-sq-ft plans the user actually viewed via the detail page, allowing the evaluator to know which two plans were compared and to inspect their estimated_build_cost values.

required_variables.set_condition: After successfully creating a plan consultation (plan exists and consultation record created) AND the plan has bedrooms === 3 and typeof plan.size_sq_ft === 'number' and plan.size_sq_ft < 2000.
required_variables.value_to_set: plan.id (the ID of the plan for which the consultation was requested), via: localStorage.setItem('task3_selectedCheaperPlanId', plan.id);
required_variables.reason: Identifies which qualifying plan the user ultimately chose for consultation. The evaluator can then cross-check this ID against task3_comparedPlanIds and the plans data to ensure it is the cheaper of the two compared 3-bedroom, <2000 sq ft plans.

requirements.task_name: Use the cost calculator to estimate a 2200 sq ft modern home and request a detailed estimate
requirements.task_description: Use the website’s cost calculator for a custom home: configure a 2200 sq ft modern home with 3 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, mid-range finishes in ZIP code 94110, then submit a request for a detailed estimate using the provided form.
existing_variables: cost_calculator_configs
// parameters passed to runCostCalculator, including sq ft, style, bedrooms, baths, finishes, ZIP
detailed_estimate_requests
// link to calculator_config_id, plus name, email, description, estimate_type
services
// service_key can be inspected to ensure this used the custom home service

requirements.task_name: Save three 2023 sustainability-focused articles to a reading list
requirements.task_description: Browse the blog or resources section, filter for sustainability-related content published in 2023, then add the first three qualifying articles to a built-in reading list or saved items feature.
existing_variables: saved_items
// contains saved article IDs with item_type = 'article'
articles
// contains year, tags, and is_sustainability_focused flags to check 2023 & sustainability criteria

requirements.task_name: Find a high-budget urban infill testimonial mentioning communication or timeline and copy its link
requirements.task_description: Browse client testimonials to find one for a project with a budget over $800,000 in an urban infill or city lot context that mentions either communication or timeline, then use the testimonial’s built-in share or copy-link feature.
existing_variables: testimonials
// includes context, budget_total, and optionally mentions_communication / mentions_timeline flags
testimonial_shares
// records copy-link/share actions by testimonial_id and method
contact_inquiries
// message field can be inspected for pasted testimonial URL and required text

requirements.task_name: Book an in-studio consultation for a custom home on a specific date and time slot
requirements.task_description: Use the booking or consultation scheduling feature to reserve an in-studio consultation for a custom home project on a specified date next month at a 3:00 PM time slot.
existing_variables: consultation_bookings
// appointment_type, appointment_datetime, name, email, notes are stored and sufficient for validation

requirements.task_name: Find the most expensive commercial project built after 2019 and inquire about it
requirements.task_description: Filter commercial projects completed after 2019, sort them by cost from highest to lowest, open the most expensive one, and submit an inquiry specifically referencing that project.
existing_variables: projects
// used to compute most expensive commercial project >= 2020 and validate the chosen project
project_inquiries
// contains the investor_commercial_inquiry with project_id, name, email, message
